stemHtml:
Refer to the figure or CAP 698 Figure 4.31.
Due to a predictive wind shear warning, a take-off at Madrid airport is rejected. Using the data below, when can another take-off be attempted?

Take-off mass: 61 300 kg
Aerodrome elevation: 2000 ft
OAT: +34°C
Wind: calm
Speed at rejection: 80 kt

options.a: Cooling is recommended and it requires approximately 30 minutes when giving credit for reverse.
options.b: Cooling is recommended and it requires approximately 40 minutes when giving credit for reverse.
options.c: The fuse plugs may melt and the take-off must be delayed by approximately 40 minutes.
options.d: Cooling is recommended and it will require approximately 45 minutes to achieve this.
